name: thinkbreak
description: Open configurable waiting content while an agent works, then pause media and restore focus.

interface.shortDescription: Browse configurable content while Codex works
interface.longDescription: ThinkBreak switches to a dedicated Chrome window after a short delay, then pauses media and restores the original agent window when work completes or needs permission.
defaultPrompt: Enable ThinkBreak so I can browse the selected waiting content while this Codex task runs.
